Surname.en: Automaton who Dreams of Clear Skies
Surname.jp: 蒼空を夢見る自動人形

name.jp: オンスロットドライブ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Triggered Effect) Counterattacks all enemies when attacked.\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>, and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance each to inflict 2 <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> effects on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nThe counterattack effect is only activated once every <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.jp: (発動効果)攻撃を受けた場合、敵全体に反撃する。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPし、敵全体にそれぞれ<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>2個を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n反撃は<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>に1回発動する。
description.kr: (발동 효과) 공격 당할 시 적 전체에게 반격합니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가하고, 각각 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 2개 부여합니다.\n반격은 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>에 한 번만 발동합니다.
description.zh: (触发效果)受到攻击时,对全体敌人发动反击。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>,并各有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对全体敌人造成2个<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n反击<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>仅能发动1次。

name.jp: ディストーションレイ

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nIf the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color>, damage dealt increases, and <color=#28d9ed>detonates</color> all <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> stacks on the target after attacking.\nSigma becomes Vulnerable after attacking, and all enemies' Ultimate Skill damage increases for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>状態の場合ダメージがUPする。攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>をすべて<color=#28d9ed>破裂</color>させる。\nこの攻撃後、【シグマ】は【脆弱状態】となり、必殺スキルで受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color> 상태라면 피해량이 증가하고, 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 모두 <color=#28d9ed>폭발</color>시킵니다.\n공격 후 시그마는 취약상태가 되어, 적 전체의 필살기의 피해량이<color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>状态,则使伤害量提升,攻击后使所有<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果<color=#28d9ed>爆炸</color>。\n攻击后西格玛会进入衰弱状态,使全体敌人的必杀技伤害量提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: アンガースタック V

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Attack by <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使攻击力提升<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> of Max Health or lower.

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color>: Attacks all enemies, then inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> twice on each target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. Permanently stops taking Weakness Gauge damage, increases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>, and reduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color>. Aside from Burned, the aforementioned effects are irremovable.

<color=#ffd732>If Enraged within 3 turns or fewer, grants 80 Chain Points.</color>
description.jp:
最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下になると<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:敵全体にダメージを与え、対象全体に<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を2個<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。その後WGダメージを受けなくなり、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPし、<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>がDOWNする。火傷以外の効果は解除されない。

<color=#ffd732>3ターン以内に【狂暴化】した場合、敵にCPを80獲得させる。</color>
description.kr:
최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다. 

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> : 적 전체를 공격 후, 대상 모두에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 2개 부여합니다. 이후 영구적으로 WG 피해를 받지 않고, <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>/<color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가하고 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>가 감소합니다. 화상을 제외한 효과들은 해제되지 않습니다.

<color=#ffd732>3턴 안에 광폭화할 시 80의 CP를 회복시킵니다.</color>
description.zh:
若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。

<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>:攻击全体敌人后,对所有目标造成2个<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。此后永久不受WG伤害,且<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>/<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低。除烧伤外的效果不会被解除。

<color=#ffd732>在3回合内陷入狂暴化时,使CP恢复80。</color>
